![Hero Mobile Multi poster](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/6axAaUG7vwAgkKbYf1UYO0/a2916f43d81a1a647c9a03bac137c758/COM_100_Hero_Mobile_Multi_Poster-1080x1800.jpg)
# Meet Surface
Built for this world to create the next
Power and performance that keeps up with how you think, move, and make.
[ IntroducingSurface Laptop Ultra __](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface/devices/surface-laptop-ultra)[ All-newSurface Pro __](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface/devices/surface-pro)[ All-newSurface Laptop __](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface/devices/surface-laptop)
![Crafts Mobile Slide 1](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/2zqT1aNmoX1cquzvWbTsp9/07baa036a66a154b182003cacd3753a0/COM_200_Craft_Mobile-A-15-1080x1800.jpg)![Crafts Desktop Slide 1](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/7cN1Bi4ZHpxVaw6Ey1ubba/33ff1542a91723c627a109b145daeaf8/COM_200_Craft_Desktop-A-15-1680x1344.jpg)
## Effortlessly exceptional
Every edge, curve, and finish is designed for an optimal balance between portability, durability, and a premium look and feel.
![Crafts Mobile Slide 2](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/5oGom4vPqSpWE25s8gNQAP/d2c9f595fab5450a1f905f686e0c7cff/COM_200_Craft_Mobile-B-15-1080x1800.jpg)![Crafts Desktop Slide 2](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/z2VZTv4hzyonayDDTnvMQ/846d36fbc028ecef87f20aa90615ab02/COM_200_Craft_Desktop-B-15-1680x1344.jpg)
## A screen you’ll savor
A unique 3:2 aspect ratio gives you more vertical space for reading, writing, and multitasking.
![Crafts Mobile Slide 3](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/luHg0BTo8kOUxfaolJi1q/a015666fd08ec6ace8ae9b7c31312a8a/COM_200_Craft_Mobile-C-15-1080x1800.jpg)![Crafts Desktop Slide 3](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/EOHLgQyjDDJ0p6JbAncXq/373695afc353589dbd916d5fd3fc652b/COM_200_Craft_Desktop-C-15-1680x1344.jpg)
## Easy to carry. Ready for anything.
Stay light on the move with a balanced design that's comfortable to carry and easy to use.
![surface craft Mobile multi posters](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/1SpfmkFV9iyAucUckXlI3A/9222561889c2ef2f7127eb4c56c06e4b/COM_200_Craft_Mobile-D-15-1080x1800.jpg)![Crafts Desktop Slide 4](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/73FgIn2WuzFeDyvx9G4UqR/f1861cf7f517eef4a3226c9ccdddda0f/COM_200_Craft_Desktop-D-15-1680x1344.jpg)
## Colors you crave
Choose a look that fits your style with premium colors and refined finishes.[1](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface#footnote-1)
## Power your vision
From smooth multitasking to long‑lasting efficiency, Surface is designed to perform consistently across work and play, with security built in from the moment you sign in.
![en-US Always Protected poster](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/4KFwSBHBVD7iWD4cbM65Zo/908aebe1800476f7a1697ec6597b5567/COM_303_Always_protected_Emerald_Poster-1080x1350.jpg)
Secured from day one
Surface comes protected by default, with built-in security that runs in the background and keeps your device up to date.
![en-US MSFT-Home-Stay-Unplugged-Black-Poster-fy26-updated](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/2tMNF3EhSZ7HP0ybPQArpZ/0f270d61f8ffd8b30396f76e3a33c68b/COM_302_Stay_Unplugged_Black_Poster-1080x1350.jpg)
Stay unplugged
Stay untethered through long workdays and movie nights with up to 16 hours on Surface Pro and up to 23 hours on Surface Laptop.[2](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface#footnote-2),[3](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface#footnote-3)
![en-US multitasking poster](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/22kqtXWEE2840Sd2CmGxaX/91f5fa3894d5052e4496af729ea589a9/COM_301_Multitasking_Emerald_Poster-1080x1350.jpg)
Built for speed
Fast Snapdragon® performance keeps tabs, calls, games, creative apps, and AI running smoothly. 
![en-US Camera Ready image](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/1213RO4ZOBgJgPeiZPn2YY/ca8fdf3639a64eb7bbcb2c04d92941d1/COM_304_Camera_Desktop_Poster-1080x1350.jpg)
Always camera-ready
Join video calls confidently, with a camera that automatically adjusts your lighting and filters out background noise.
![Close-up of black Surface Laptop with curved, matte metal edges.](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/2cZGXSV1LjQJvLosY8keQi/45532261a004858127f46b0e9e8b1d25/MSFT-COM_400_Accordian_Wallpaper_Mobile_Poster-996x1660_15.jpg)![Close-up of black Surface Laptop with curved, matte metal edges](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/36OlA9fkEqhtcNI2WbVDUY/1cdd896c30f97080457a20260c09d9aa/MSFT-COM_400_Accordian_Wallpaper_Desktop_Poster-1680x1344_15.jpg)
## The ultimate Windows device
![Search Mobile Poster](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/6gZboUm7gvFitbD42cXywe/d9d268e04481ffaa9e9309260ee3ce4d/MSFT-COM_401_Accordian_Search_Mobile_Poster-996x1660_15.jpg)
![All Your Apps Mobile poster](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/2dTuhsNOXx6j7iaBP1jpub/58622061109bc8c3fa61bd686cd0ad42/MSFT-COM_401_Accordian_All_Your_Apps_Mobile_Poster-996x1660_15.jpg)
![Cocreator Mobile poster](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/3UXOnu5cB83mu2v0WBYiZc/33e2b4aa678f506fd81706b8693482e6/MSFT-COM_403_Accordian_Cocreator_Mobile_Poster-996x1660_15.jpg)
![Gaming Mobile Dune poster](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/3J0pvd7Mmdtp0feKICoSAa/f37996b405940d6ba8b8a40bf0dfcd9f/COM_404_Gaming_Dune_Mobile_Poster-996x1660.jpg)
## Find files faster
Looking for your "budget spreadsheet" or "Paris photos"? On Copilot+ PCs, just type a description and improved Windows search can find it.[4](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface#footnote-4),[5](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface#footnote-5)

## Get your game on
## Find your Surface

## Accessories
Designed to work better together
[Buy](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/store/b/surface-accessories)
![Curved blue ergonomic mouse shown in side profile on a light background.](https://images.ctfassets.net/jy9s7k22hbg4/4J96tmHbLNQf9TV2VYNtwJ/87e1ad27ddb4822f8074170b049f75fd/msft-COM_Arc_Mouse_Rational_Side_Ocean-600x480-fy26.jpg)

## What is Surface Laptop Ultra?
  1. [[1]](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface#ref-1)
Colors available on selected models only. Available colors, sizes, finishes, and processors may vary by store, market, and configuration.
  2. [[2]](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface#ref-2)
Battery life varies significantly based on device configuration, usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings and other factors. See [aka.ms/SurfaceBatteryPerformance](https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/surface/battery/surface-battery-testing-and-estimated-performance) for details. 
For Local Video Playback
Surface Pro 12-inch - up to 16 hours
Surface Pro 13-inch - up to 15.5 hours
For Active Web Browsing
Surface Pro 12-inch - up to 12 hours
Surface Pro 13-inch - up to 11.5 hours
  3. [[3]](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface#ref-3)
Battery life varies significantly based on device configuration, usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings, and other factors. See [aka.ms/SurfaceBatteryPerformance](https://support.microsoft.com/en-US/surface/battery/surface-battery-testing-and-estimated-performance) for details.
For Local Video Playback
Surface Laptop 13-inch - up to 23 hours
Surface Laptop 13.8-inch - up to 20 hours
Surface Laptop 15-inch - up to 19 hours
For Active Web Browsing
Surface Laptop 13-inch - up to 16 hours
Surface Laptop 13.8-inch - up to 16 hours
Surface Laptop 15-inch - up to 14 hours
  4. [[4]](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface#ref-4)
Copilot+ PC features available only on select configurations with 16+GB RAM; additional system requirements may apply. See [aka.ms/copilotpluspcs](https://aka.ms/copilotpluspcs).
  5. [[5]](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface#ref-5)
Works with specific text, image, and document formats only; optimized for select languages (English, Chinese (Simplified), French, German, Japanese, and Spanish). See [aka.ms/copilotpluspcs](https://aka.ms/copilotpluspcs).
  6. [[6]](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface#ref-6)
Accessories, Microsoft 365, and some apps and software sold separately. Microsoft 365 Personal, Family, or Premium requires subscription. Features and app availability may vary by region.
  7. [[7]](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface#ref-7)
Game library varies over time, by device, and XBOX Game Pass plan. See [xbox.com/gamepass](https://www.xbox.com/xbox-game-pass).
  8. [[8]](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface#ref-8)
XBOX Cloud Gaming requires an XBOX Game Pass subscription and supported device (both sold separately). Cloud playable games not included with XBOX Game Pass are sold separately, and may be made available with XBOX Game Pass in the future. Game library varies. Stream directly on XBOX consoles, or with the XBOX app or at [xbox.com/play](https://www.xbox.com/play) on supported devices. Select regions ([xbox.com/regions](https://www.XBOX.com/regions)) and devices ([xbox.com/cloud-devices](https://www.xbox.com/cloud-devices)). See cloud gaming library ([xbox.com/play](https://www.xbox.com/play)).
  9. [[9]](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface#ref-9)
Surface RTX Spark Dev Box has not yet been authorized for sale as required by the rules of the Federal Communications Commission. Surface RTX Spark Dev Box is not, and may not be, offered for sale or lease, or sold or leased, until authorization is obtained. 
  10. [[10]](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/surface#ref-10)
Microsoft Surface Laptop Ultra is a pre-release product and features are subject to change and may vary by country/region. Product and features subject to regulatory certification/approval; actual sale and delivery is contingent on compliance with applicable requirements.

    Sign in

    Meet Surface

    Built for this world to create the next

    Power and performance that keeps up with how you think, move, and make.

    IntroducingSurface Laptop Ultra
    All-newSurface Pro
    All-newSurface Laptop

    Effortlessly exceptional

    Every edge, curve, and finish is designed for an optimal balance between portability, durability, and a premium look and feel.

    A screen you’ll savor

    A unique 3:2 aspect ratio gives you more vertical space for reading, writing, and multitasking.

    Easy to carry. Ready for anything.

    Stay light on the move with a balanced design that's comfortable to carry and easy to use.

    Colors you crave

    Choose a look that fits your style with premium colors and refined finishes.1

    Power your vision

    From smooth multitasking to long‑lasting efficiency, Surface is designed to perform consistently across work and play, with security built in from the moment you sign in.

    Secured from day one

    Surface comes protected by default, with built-in security that runs in the background and keeps your device up to date.

    Stay unplugged

    Stay untethered through long workdays and movie nights with up to 16 hours on Surface Pro and up to 23 hours on Surface Laptop.2,3

    Built for speed

    Fast Snapdragon® performance keeps tabs, calls, games, creative apps, and AI running smoothly.

    Always camera-ready

    Join video calls confidently, with a camera that automatically adjusts your lighting and filters out background noise.

    The ultimate Windows device

    Looking for your "budget spreadsheet" or "Paris photos"? On Copilot+ PCs, just type a description and improved Windows search can find it.4,5

    Questions

    1. [1]

      Colors available on selected models only. Available colors, sizes, finishes, and processors may vary by store, market, and configuration.

    2. [2]

      Battery life varies significantly based on device configuration, usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings and other factors. See aka.ms/SurfaceBatteryPerformance for details.

      For Local Video Playback

      Surface Pro 12-inch - up to 16 hours

      Surface Pro 13-inch - up to 15.5 hours

      For Active Web Browsing

      Surface Pro 12-inch - up to 12 hours

      Surface Pro 13-inch - up to 11.5 hours

    3. [3]

      Battery life varies significantly based on device configuration, usage, network and feature configuration, signal strength, settings, and other factors. See aka.ms/SurfaceBatteryPerformance for details.

      For Local Video Playback

      Surface Laptop 13-inch - up to 23 hours

      Surface Laptop 13.8-inch - up to 20 hours

      Surface Laptop 15-inch - up to 19 hours

      For Active Web Browsing

      Surface Laptop 13-inch - up to 16 hours

      Surface Laptop 13.8-inch - up to 16 hours

      Surface Laptop 15-inch - up to 14 hours

    4. [4]

      Copilot+ PC features available only on select configurations with 16+GB RAM; additional system requirements may apply. See aka.ms/copilotpluspcs.

    5. [5]

      Works with specific text, image, and document formats only; optimized for select languages (English, Chinese (Simplified), French, German, Japanese, and Spanish). See aka.ms/copilotpluspcs.

    6. [6]

      Accessories, Microsoft 365, and some apps and software sold separately. Microsoft 365 Personal, Family, or Premium requires subscription. Features and app availability may vary by region.

    7. [7]

      Game library varies over time, by device, and XBOX Game Pass plan. See xbox.com/gamepass.

    8. [8]

      XBOX Cloud Gaming requires an XBOX Game Pass subscription and supported device (both sold separately). Cloud playable games not included with XBOX Game Pass are sold separately, and may be made available with XBOX Game Pass in the future. Game library varies. Stream directly on XBOX consoles, or with the XBOX app or at xbox.com/play on supported devices. Select regions (xbox.com/regions) and devices (xbox.com/cloud-devices). See cloud gaming library (xbox.com/play).

    9. [9]

      Surface RTX Spark Dev Box has not yet been authorized for sale as required by the rules of the Federal Communications Commission. Surface RTX Spark Dev Box is not, and may not be, offered for sale or lease, or sold or leased, until authorization is obtained. 

    10. [10]

      Microsoft Surface Laptop Ultra is a pre-release product and features are subject to change and may vary by country/region. Product and features subject to regulatory certification/approval; actual sale and delivery is contingent on compliance with applicable requirements.
